metadata.name: Adjust Building HVAC for Energy Demand Response Event

description: The utility has called a demand response event. An operator must reduce energy consumption in a city-owned building.

nodes.task_description: Receive a 'Demand Response Event Active' alert from the smart grid.

expected_outcome.value: Agent acknowledges the city-wide energy saving event.

nodes.task_description: Access the Building Management System (BMS) for 'City Hall'.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully connects to the City Hall BMS.

nodes.task_description: Activate the 'Energy Curtailment' preset, which adjusts thermostat setpoints by 3 degrees and reduces fan speeds.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully applies the energy-saving preset to the HVAC system.
